scripts.build:chrome: xcopy chrome build\chrome /E /Y /I && xcopy shared build\chrome /E /Y /I
scripts.build:firefox: xcopy firefox build\firefox /E /Y /I && xcopy shared build\firefox /E /Y /I && powershell Compress-Archive -Path build\firefox\* -DestinationPath build\firefox.zip -Force && powershell Remove-Item -Recurse -Force build\firefox
scripts.build:all: npm run clean && npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
